command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Watching Remy logs for YOUR real group message for 70s ==="
echo "Send a message in the Telegram group now (e.g. 'Remy are you there?')"

# Watch journal for telegram message activity
START=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
for i in $(seq 1 14); do
  sleep 5
  NEW=$(journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --since "$START" --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "telegram.*message|inbound|group|reply|response|-1003934415467|agent" | grep -v "menu text\|polling ingress\|starting provider")
  if [ -n "$NEW" ]; then
    echo "--- activity at +$((i*5))s ---"
    echo "$NEW" | tail -6
  fi
done

echo ""
echo "=== Final: all telegram-related log lines since watch start ==="
journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --since "$START" --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "telegram|message|agent|reply|response" | grep -v "menu text" | tail -20
REMOTE
